-- Owambe.com — Initial Database Migration
-- Run: npx prisma migrate dev --name init
-- Or:  npx prisma migrate deploy (production)

-- PostGIS extension (must be enabled manually on Railway)
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgis;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS uuid_ossp;

-- NOTE: The actual migration SQL is auto-generated by Prisma from schema.prisma
-- Run `npx prisma migrate dev` to generate the migration files
-- Run `npx prisma migrate deploy` to apply migrations in production

-- Manual steps required on Railway:
-- 1. Connect to Railway PostgreSQL
-- 2. Run: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgis;
-- 3. Run: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS uuid_ossp;
-- 4. Then run: npx prisma migrate deploy

-- Indexes for performance (added via Prisma schema @@index directives):
-- users: email (unique), role
-- vendors: category, status, city, isInstantBook
-- events: plannerId, status, startDate
-- bookings: vendorId, plannerId, consumerId, status, eventDate
-- attendees: eventId, email, qrCode
-- check_ins: eventId
-- notifications: userId + isRead

-- Geo query example (PostGIS):
-- SELECT * FROM vendors
-- WHERE ST_DWithin(
--   ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(longitude, latitude), 4326)::geography,
--   ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint($1, $2), 4326)::geography,
--   $3 * 1000  -- radius in metres
-- )
-- AND status = 'VERIFIED'
-- ORDER BY rating DESC;
